notes: Single source of truth for Q402 deployed contracts and EIP-712 signing conventions.
If values in this file differ from app/lib/relayer.ts, public/q402-sdk.js, or README.md — this file wins.
A contracts-manifest.test.ts test asserts relayer.ts + sdk agree with this manifest.

witness.notes: verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)).
verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)).

RLUSD.notes: Ripple USD — NY DFS regulated stablecoin issued by Standard Custody & Trust (Ripple subsidiary). ERC-20 + EIP-2612 permit. UUPS upgradeable proxy; implementation at 0x9747a0d261c2d56eb93f542068e5d1e23170fa9e. Q402 uses the EIP-7702 + EIP-712 TransferAuthorization witness pattern, so RLUSD's permit support is incidental — not required for settlement.

witness.notes: verifyingContract is the user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation, NOT the impl contract.
verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)).

USDC.notes: Mantle-native canonical-bridged USDC (L2StandardERC20, Mantle L2 bridge 0x4200...0010, L1 counterpart 0xA0b8...eB48).

USDT.notes: USDT0 (LayerZero OFT) — Mantle ecosystem's default USDT implementation per official 2025-11-27 announcement. Legacy canonical-bridged USDT (0x201EBa5CC46D216Ce6DC03F6a759e8E766e956aE) deposits sunset 2026-02-03; on-chain supply of USDT0 is ~12.5x the legacy. USDT0 shares this 0x779Ded... address with Stable via CREATE3 deterministic deployment; decimals differ per chain (Mantle 6, Stable 18).

witness.notes: verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)). Impl deployed 2026-06-15 by 0xfc77...f466; on-chain NAME() = 'Q402 Injective'. The impl address is distinct per chain (CREATE depends on the deployer nonce on each chain); it must not be assumed equal across chains. Distinguished at signing time by chainId 1776 + domainName 'Q402 Injective'.

USDC.notes: Native Circle USDC (CCTP) on Injective EVM. Verified on-chain: symbol='USDC', name='USDC', decimals=6.

USDT.notes: Canonical Tether on Injective EVM (MTS-compliant — Cosmos and EVM share the same balance via MultiVM Token Standard). Verified on-chain: symbol='USDT', name='Tether', decimals=6.

stable.name: Stable

witness.notes: verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)).

stable.notes: USDT0 is both the gas token and the transfer token. API token keys 'USDC' and 'USDT' both resolve to the USDT0 address.

witness.notes: verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)). Monad fully supports EIP-7702 (docs.monad.xyz/developer-essentials/eip-7702). Note: Monad's reserve-balance rule disallows delegated EOAs from dipping below 10 MON in a single TX — Q402 only moves ERC-20 tokens, so a delegated user's MON balance is unchanged by transfer() and the rule does not trigger in normal operation.

USDC.notes: Native Circle USDC via CCTP V2 — issued by Circle, not bridged. 17 source chains supported via CCTP.

USDT.notes: USDT0 (LayerZero OFT) — Tether's omnichain standard on Monad. Same OFT family as Mantle's USDT0 entry.

witness.notes: verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)). EIP-7702 (set-code transactions, type 0x04) is live on Scroll mainnet via the Euclid upgrade (phase 1 2025-04-16, phase 2 2025-04-22 — see docs.scroll.io/en/technology/overview/scroll-upgrades/euclid-upgrade). Impl redeployed 2026-06-15 by 0xfc77...f466; on-chain NAME() = 'Q402 Scroll'. The impl address is distinct per chain (CREATE depends on the deployer nonce on each chain); it must not be assumed equal across chains. Distinguished at signing time by chainId 534352 + domainName 'Q402 Scroll'.

USDC.notes: Native Circle USDC on Scroll mainnet (confirmed with Scroll team).

USDT.notes: Tether's canonical Scroll deployment (confirmed with Scroll team).

witness.notes: verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)). EIP-7702 (set-code transactions, type 0x04) is live on Arbitrum One mainnet since ArbOS 40 'Callisto'; ArbOS 51 'Dia' (activated 2026-01-08) refined precompile delegation behavior to align with the EIP-7702 spec. Impl redeployed 2026-06-15 by 0xfc77...f466; on-chain NAME() = 'Q402 Arbitrum'. The impl address is distinct per chain (CREATE depends on the deployer nonce on each chain); it must not be assumed equal across chains. Distinguished at signing time by chainId 42161 + domainName 'Q402 Arbitrum'.

USDC.notes: Native Circle USDC on Arbitrum One — issued by Circle via CCTP, not the legacy bridged USDC.e (0xFF970A61A04b1cA14834A43f5dE4533eBDDB5CC8). Q402 intentionally rejects USDC.e to avoid the bridged/native confusion that surfaced during Mantle's USDT migration.

witness.notes: verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)). Impl deployed 2026-06-19 by 0xfc77...f466 (CREATE at nonce 0 on Base, which is why this address matches the Stable-chain impl — coincidental, they are distinct chains). On-chain verified: NAME()='Q402 Base', VERSION()='1', owner-binding reverts OwnerMismatch(). EIP-7702 (type 0x04 set-code) live on Base mainnet via the OP Stack Isthmus upgrade (L1 Pectra-aligned); verified by the type-4 smoke tx 0xc2034668a260526ef88ae3ab0d8d01bd82c62ea3c5136cbf0755dd1e87d3b9ed (2026-06-19) — payer EOA delegated (code 0xef0100<impl>), 0.001 USDC moved gaslessly, recipient credited. Distinguished at signing time by chainId 8453 + domainName 'Q402 Base'.

USDC.notes: Native Circle USDC on Base (issued by Circle), not the legacy bridged USDbC (0xd9aAEc86B65D86f6A7B5B1b0c42FFA531710b6CA). Q402 uses native USDC only. Verified on-chain: symbol=USDC decimals=6.

USDT.notes: Bridged Tether USD (USDT) on Base, 6 decimals. This is a bridged token (not native Tether issuance) with thinner liquidity (~$25M supply) than native USDC. Verified on-chain: symbol=USDT decimals=6 name='Tether USD'.

witness.notes: verifyingContract = user's own EOA under EIP-7702 delegation (contract _domainSeparator uses address(this)). On-chain NAME() = 'Q402 Robinhood Chain'. Distinguished at signing time by chainId 4663 + domainName 'Q402 Robinhood Chain'. USDG-only chain (Paxos Global Dollar): there is NO Circle USDC and NO Tether USDT on Robinhood Chain — the on-chain tokens carrying those symbols are mock/scam and are intentionally NOT supported. Allowlist is USDG only.

USDG.notes: Paxos Global Dollar (USDG) — the only supported token on Robinhood Chain, 6 decimals. Verified on-chain: symbol='USDG'.

authorizationGuard.description: The relay server MUST reject POST /api/relay unless authorization.chainId equals chains[chain].chainId and authorization.address (lowercase) equals chains[chain].implContract (lowercase).

notes: Cross-chain USDC bridge via Chainlink CCIP. Scope is intentionally narrow: USDC routing on the 3-chain triangle ETH ↔ AVAX ↔ Arbitrum One.

Verified ground truth: only these 3 chains' USDC token pools have each other in `getSupportedChains()` on-chain. BNB/Mantle/Scroll/X Layer/Monad/Stable/Injective — CCIP routers exist on most but Circle has not deployed CCIP-routable USDC pools there.

Sender contract: Q402CCIPSender deployed per chain. Holds LINK + native pool topped up by facilitator. Mode C only (server-managed Agentic Wallet) for v1 — Q402 server signs ccipSend directly as Agentic Wallet, so no EIP-712 BridgeAuthorization needed in MVP.
Receiver: token-only transfer to EOA. No destination Q402 contract in v1 (Phase 2 may add Q402CCIPReceiver for programmable settlement).
Fees: free Q402 markup. User pays only actual CCIP fee, debited from Gas Tank (LINK slot or native), 1:1 with facilitator's pool consumption.

gasTankSchema.description: Gas Tank KV is extended with a LINK slot per CCIP chain. Native slot (existing) is also valid for fee payment with a 10% CCIP surcharge.

feePolicy.description: Q402 takes no fee on top of the CCIP cost. User pays exactly what Chainlink charges (LINK or native, per their choice).

notes: Cross-chain USDT (USDT0) bridge via LayerZero OFT. Companion rail to `.ccip` (USDC). Agent picks the rail by token: USDC -> CCIP, USDT/USDT0 -> OFT.

Sender contract: Q402OftSender deployed per chain. Holds a NATIVE pool (LayerZero fee is native-only) topped up by the facilitator from the same Gas Tank machinery. bridgeFor is onlyFacilitator (drain-proof); recipient is force-bound to the owner's own address on the destination chain.

OFT contracts are the existing USDT0 deployments (no custom bridge protocol). On EVERY v1 chain USDT0 is an OFT ADAPTER wrapping that chain's canonical USDT (token != oft) - verified on-chain via OFT.token(): eth 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7, arbitrum 0xFd086bC7CD5C481DCC9C85ebE478A1C0b69FCbb9, mantle+xlayer 0x779Ded0c9e1022225f8E0630b35a9b54bE713736, monad 0xe7cd86e13AC4309349F30B3435a9d337750fC82D. The Sender derives the token via OFT.token() at runtime so no token address is hardcoded here.
v1 chains: eth, arbitrum, mantle, monad, xlayer (all 6-decimal). avax, bnb, stable are v2 (addresses to be gathered; stable USDT0 is 18-decimal).

VERIFY-BEFORE-DEPLOY: confirm each `oft` address + its token()/eid on-chain, confirm every listed lane has a live USDT0 peer, and confirm enforcedOptions are set (else supply built executor lzReceive options). `sender` addresses are populated after Q402OftSender is deployed per chain.
Fees: no Q402 markup. User pays the LayerZero native fee, debited from the Gas Tank native slot 1:1 with the Sender pool's consumption.

gasTankSchema.description: Reuses the existing native Gas Tank slot. No LINK slot (LayerZero fee is native-only).

feePolicy.description: Q402 takes no fee on top of the LayerZero cost. User pays exactly the native messaging fee, debited from the Gas Tank.
